queries.question: Who made the latest movie?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Studio JOIN Movie ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id ORDER BY release_date DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:release_date ?release_date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?release_date_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who made the latest movie?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Director JOIN Movie ON Director.id = Movie.director_id ORDER BY release_date DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?director p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:release_date ?release_date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?release_date_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who made the latest movie?
queries.sql: SELECT Studio.name, Director.name FROM Studio JOIN Movie ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id JOIN Director ON Director.id = Movie.director_id   ORDER BY release_date DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
  ?movie p:release_date ?release_date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?release_date_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: which director made the movie inception?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Director JOIN Movie ON Director.id = Movie.director_id WHERE title = 'Inception'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?director p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
}

queries.question: which studio and director made the movie inception?
queries.sql: SELECT Studio.name, Director.name FROM Studio JOIN Movie ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id  JOIN Director ON Director.id = Movie.director_id  WHERE title = 'Inception'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
  ?movie p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
}
